hero.title: Work that held under real conditions.
hero.lead: These aren't polished success stories written after the fact. Each one documents a structural problem, the decisions made, and what the operation looks like now.

caseStudies.title: Fuel distribution platform for a 340-depot network
caseStudies.excerpt: A national distributor running on fragmented spreadsheets and radio coordination. Delivery failures were invisible until they became escalations. We rebuilt the coordination layer entirely.

caseStudies.title: Multi-location coordination platform for 22-clinic group
caseStudies.excerpt: Scheduling, supply ordering, and clinical handoffs across 22 locations were managed through individual WhatsApp groups. We designed a unified coordination layer without disrupting operations during rollout.

caseStudies.title: Fleet operations platform for enterprise logistics provider
caseStudies.excerpt: Real-time visibility across 1,200+ vehicles was theoretically possible but practically absent. Dispatch decisions were made on stale data. We built the telemetry layer and control interface from scratch.
